# defectdojo_tool_product_settings (Data Source)

Data source for DefectDojo Tool Product Settings

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "defectdojo_tool_product_settings" "example" {
  id = "1"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `id` (String) Identifier

### Read-Only

- `description` (String) Description of the tool product settings.
- `name` (String) Name of the tool product settings.
- `product` (Number) The ID of the Product.
- `setting_url` (String) The settings URL for the tool.
- `tool_configuration` (Number) The ID of the Tool Configuration.
- `tool_project_id` (String) The project ID in the tool.
- `url` (String) URL for the tool product settings.
